troparion: (Tone 5) Show Your mercy toward us, O Lord;* do not treat us as our sins deserve,* we beseech You, O holy and almighty Master.
prokimenon: Praise, O servants of the Lord,
praise the name of the Lord!
May the name of the Lord be blessed both now and forevermore
second_prokimenon: May you be blessed* by the Lord,
the maker of heaven and earth.
The heavens belong to the Lord but the earth he has given to men.
